'''[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g/ BattleGrounds Mobile India]''' on the occasion of the release of the 1.7.0 update of [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]], present a fun tournament named "'''The Fall Season Face-Off'''". The tournament features 18 invited teams who will compete for a prize pool of ₹4,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===

===Format===
'''''The Fall Season Face-Off:''' 16th November 2021 to 17th November 2021.''
* ''18 Teams ''
* ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Sanhok]] and [[Vikendi]] ''
* ''8 Matches to be played over a period 2 days (Including Two Pan Fight, One Sniper Fight, and One Emote Challenge).''
